# CADRO

> Cloud-based HR platform for TR/EN/DE/AR audiences.

## Canonical site
- https://www.cadro.io/

## Core sections
- Product: https://www.cadro.io/ik-yazilimi.html
- Pricing: https://www.cadro.io/pricing.html
- Blog: https://www.cadro.io/blog.html
- Case studies: https://www.cadro.io/vaka-calismalari.html
